text: Surrounded by the hum of quiet conversations blending with the luminous glow of digital screens, I anchor myself against the persistent tide of self-doubt. The repetition of 'I'm not going to give up' echoes within me like a silent mantra, a fragile yet resolute promise to persist, even when uncertainty looms. The world of research and innovation swirling around me both intimidates and inspires—the unfamiliar slides and coded words beckon me to learn, to keep moving forward. I am anxious, yet strangely hopeful. Here, now, I feel the tension between vulnerability and determination; I am present, I am enduring, and I am quietly proud.
